policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: Two clean Node 22/V8 runs on 2026-07-15 were identical; one line permits only negligible instrumentation variance.

Four clean .NET 10/Coverlet runs on 2026-07-15 were identical after deterministic tests covered both valid bookmark update/delete race outcomes; one line permits only negligible instrumentation variance.
